mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.nickname AS from_user_nickname, u.avatar AS from_user_avatar, p.title AS product_title FROM review r LEFT JOIN `user` u ON r.from_user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN product p ON r.product_id = p.id WHERE r.id = #{id} AND r.deleted = 0

SELECT r.*, u.nickname AS from_user_nickname, u.avatar AS from_user_avatar, p.title AS product_title FROM review r LEFT JOIN `user` u ON r.from_user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN product p ON r.product_id = p.id WHERE r.to_user_id = #{toUserId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.*, u.nickname AS from_user_nickname, u.avatar AS from_user_avatar, p.title AS product_title FROM review r LEFT JOIN `user` u ON r.from_user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN product p ON r.product_id = p.id WHERE r.order_id = #{orderId} AND r.deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM review WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND from_user_id = #{fromUserId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (order_id, product_id, from_user_id, to_user_id, type, rating, content, is_anonymous) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{type}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{isAnonymous})
mapper.update: UPDATE review SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT AVG(rating) FROM review WHERE to_user_id = #{toUserId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1
